title: SIEVE: Structure-Aware Data Selection for Imitation Learning with VLA Models
innovation_summary: SIEVE: Structure-Aware Data Selection for Imitation Learning with VLA Models: In this paper, we propose SIEVE, a structure-aware data selection method for VLA imitation learning.
